title: cleidion ramosii var. lanceolatum
intro: Cleidion ramosii var. lanceolatum is a plant species, known as a variety of Cleidion ramosii, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which may help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cleidion ramosii var. lanceolatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create various herbal preparations.
